Active-agent basis (roster-windowed) · Teams: @OUTB, @CXSV, @RSLE, @SWPS, @RVTS

Team Summary

Per-team totals for the selected date range and team(s) — at the default full range this is each team's since-inception picture. YoY % compares the selected range to the same range a year earlier (falls back to PoP, the prior equal-length period, when there's no prior-year data). YoY is only shown for ranges of a year or less, so the comparison period never overlaps the selected range — for longer ranges (like "All Time") a like-for-like prior period doesn't exist, so no badge is shown.

Methodology

Logic mirrors the OB Team Dashboard. Each row is attributed to a rep's team by rep name + tenure window (roster StartDate–EndDate; blank end = still active) — the @ prefix in the source is ignored, so a rep's activity under any prefix counts during their tenure. Definitions: Net Issued = Appts Issued − Not Home; Contact Rate = Contacts / Attempts; Set Rate = Appts Set / Contacts; Issued Rate = Appts Issued / Appts Set; Demo Rate = Demos / Net Issued; Close Rate = Net Orders / Net Issued; RPA = Revenue / Net Issued; Avg Job = Revenue / Net Orders. Date filtering is based on CalendarDate alone for every metric — Attempts, Contacts, Appts Set, Issued, Demos, Net Orders, Revenue and all rates built on them. A row counts in whichever period its CalendarDate falls in, regardless of when the appointment was originally set (AppointmentSetOn). All KPIs, charts and the breakdown reflect the selected date range and team(s). YoY % compares the selected range to the same calendar range one year earlier, and is only computed when that prior-year range doesn't overlap the current selection (i.e. the selected range is a year or less) — otherwise the two periods would share months and produce a misleading percentage, so no YoY badge is shown. When there is no prior-year data (a team launched after that point), the badge automatically falls back to PoP % — the immediately preceding period of equal length. WoW % compares the last 7 days of the range to the previous 7 days.

Team Roster

Every agent tracked on a Specialty Team, with their tenure window on that team. A blank End Date means the agent is still active on that team. Agents who moved between teams (e.g. off @RVTS onto @RSLE) appear once per team they've held.
